nasb.text: when the sin which they have committed becomes known, then the assembly shall offer a bull of the herd for a sin offering and bring it before the tent of meeting.

esv.text: when the sin which they have committed becomes known, the assembly shall offer a bull from the herd for a sin offering and bring it in front of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 當發覺他們犯了罪的時候，會眾就要獻一頭公牛作贖罪祭，把牠牽到會幕前面；

ccb.text: 他们意识到后，必须献上一头公牛犊作赎罪祭。要将公牛犊带到会幕前，
